creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
Head commit: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=413889

2016Q2 commit: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=413891

I noticed after the MFH that the distinfo.x86_64 received a modification to include the i386 distfile which the quarterly branch doesn't use, but decided not to alter it as the i386 libs won't get installed and the package is unaffected.
